2606.14528.title: BayLing-Duplex: Native Full-Duplex Speech Dialogue with a Single Autoregressive LLM
2606.14528.paper_summary: Real-time, full-duplex speech interaction is a key feature of next-generation spoken chatbots, allowing the model to listen and speak at the same time and to handle natural phenomena such as overlap, hesitation, and barge-in. Existing speech language models (SpeechLMs) such as LLaMA-Omni and GLM-4-Voice are still turn-based and rely on an external Voice Activity Detection (VAD) module to mark the end of the user's turn, which fundamentally limits their interactive ability. In this paper, we introduce BayLing-Duplex, a native full-duplex SpeechLM where a single autoregressive LLM decides when to listen, when to speak, and when to stop, with no auxiliary turn-taking module. The design adds only a few special tokens to the standard vocabulary, so it transfers across LLMs and reuses existing training and serving stacks with no architectural adaptation. Starting from the public GLM-4-Voice checkpoint and using only 400K full-duplex samples for fine-tuning followed by a lightweight DPO stage, BayLing-Duplex reaches 92% turn-taking success and 100% interruption success on InstructS2S-Eval, while improving the speech-response score from 2.17 to 3.39 over Moshi. BayLing-Duplex also matches or surpasses its turn-based counterpart on Llama Questions, Web Questions, and Alpaca-Eval, showing that simultaneous listen-and-speak modeling does not sacrifice response quality.
2606.14528.paper_summary_zh: 即時全雙工語音互動是下一代語音聊天機器人的一個關鍵特徵，允許模型同時聆聽和說話，並處理重疊、猶豫和插話等自然現象。現有的語音語言模型（SpeechLMs）如LLaMA-Omni和GLM-4-Voice仍然是基於回合的，並依賴外部語音活動檢測（VAD）模組來標記用戶回合的結束，這從根本上限制了它們的互動能力。在本文中，我們介紹了BayLing-Duplex，一種原生全雙工SpeechLM，其中單一自回歸LLM決定何時聆聽、何時說話以及何時停止，無需輔助的回合控制模組。這種設計僅在標準詞彙中添加了幾個特殊標記，因此它可以在LLM之間轉移，並重用現有的訓練和服務堆棧，無需架構適應。從公共的GLM-4-Voice檢查點開始，僅使用400K全雙工樣本進行微調，隨後進行輕量級的DPO階段，BayLing-Duplex在InstructS2S-Eval上達到了92%的回合控制成功率和100%的插話成功率，同時將語音響應分數從2.17提高到3.39。BayLing-Duplex在Llama Questions、Web Questions和Alpaca-Eval上的表現與其基於回合的對應模型相匹配或超越，顯示出同時聆聽與說話的建模並未犧牲響應質量。
2606.14528.author: Qingkai Fang et.al.
2606.14528.authors: Qingkai Fang, Shoutao Guo, Yang Feng
